items.title: Migrant in limbo after employer allegedly didn't lodge visa application

children.content: A Swedish migrant says he fears being banned from Australia after his former employer allegedly mishandled his visa application.

gallery.altText: Shabbo wears a dark shirt and poses for a photo in a backyard.

thumbnail.altText: Shabbo wears a dark shirt and poses for a photo in a backyard.

items.title: Stolen car used by Sydney men in police chase linked to 'number of shootings'

children.content: The occupants of the allegedly stolen Audi threw fuel jerry cans and bleach containers from the car while trying to evade police, officers say.

image.altText: nsw police officers on a highway standing next to a crashed car that was involved in a police chase

items.title: Life as a second-generation human cannonball

children.content: David Smith grew up watching his father being shot out of a cannon, so when the time came, he said it was inevitable he would follow in his dad's flight path.

image.altText: A man is shot out of a smoking cannon in a spray of golden sparks.

items.title: Locals fear church sale could bulldoze history

children.content: Residents on a suburban street in Western Sydney fear 130 years of history will be erased if a 19th century church is bulldozed to build new homes.

gallery.altText: Glenda Davis, Amanda and Clark Stone outside Jamisontown Church
A sign outside a former church in Greater Western Sydney.
Two young men, one brunette and the other blonde, stand in front of a decommissioned church

thumbnail.altText: Glenda Davis, Amanda and Clark Stone outside Jamisontown Church

items.title: 'May as well have gone to the pub': Bellamy questions Storm after fourth loss

children.content: The Warriors have ended their decade-long run of outs against Melbourne in style as the Storm officially hit rock bottom following a heavy loss.

image.altText: Melbourne slump together after conceding a try

items.title: Teen shuns screens to turn love of chickens into growing egg business

children.content: While many teenagers spend their spare time online gaming or playing sport, 14-year-old Max Lye hangs out with a bunch of chooks and dreams of owning his own egg farm.

image.altText: A teenage boy in a red shirt and cap holds two chickens.

items.title: Town keeps museum supplied with koalas for the freezer

children.content: Most people usually drive past animals killed on the road, but in Armidale, they stop, bag them up, and drop them off at the local museum.

image.altText: A side profile image of a woman wearing glasses face-to-face with a koala.

items.title: Australians less likely to get bypass surgery now than 20 years ago

children.content: John Ross may be Australia's longest surviving double bypass patient. Here's how has the cardiac operation has evolved over the past 50 years.

image.altText: A black and white photo of a surgical operation.

items.title: Sydneysiders are leaving cars at home as fuel crisis changes behaviour

children.content: It is exactly six weeks since the conflict began in the MIddle East and data suggests Sydney motorists have changed how they travel in order to cope with record fuel prices.

items.title: War hero's looming prosecution divides opinion

children.content: Once celebrated as Australia's most decorated living war hero, the looming prosecution of Ben Roberts-Smith is shaping up to be the next trial of the century.

image.altText: a man leaning against a wall which holds a portrait of him wearing an army uniform

items.title: Milk prices may need to increase to cover soaring fuel and fertiliser costs

children.content: Dairy farmers across Australia are battling crippling fuel and fertiliser costs. The industry is now calling for a 30-cent-per-litre rise in milk prices on supermarket shelves.

image.altText: A line of black and white cows lean their heads into a feeding trough. There is yellow hay in the trough.

items.title: Hull 'robbed' at national champs as rival disqualified after 1,500m clash

children.content: Jess Hull had been on track to claim a fourth-straight 1,500m national title before being clipped by Claudia Hollingsworth, bringing her reign crashing down.

image.altText: Runner Jess Hull falls and has arms splayed out in front of her

items.title: Debra Adelaide's best friend died by suicide. She wrote a novel about her

children.content: Debra Adelaide became friends with Gabrielle Carey when they were 12. After Carey died by suicide five decades later, Adelaide tried to address her unanswered questions in a novel.

image.altText: A woman with long grey hair and wearing a green long-sleeved top, sitting a garden and patting a dog.

items.title: Long queues at EV chargers highlight gaps in charging infrastructure

children.content: Sales of electric vehicles have surged, but NSW government mapping shows regional areas are still lacking EV charging stations.

gallery.altText: Close up of electric vehicle being charged at a station in regional NSW.

thumbnail.altText: Close up of electric vehicle being charged at a station in regional NSW.

items.title: 'Your actions are deplorable': Man jailed over police officer head stomp

children.content: Koby Weaver is jailed over his role in what is described as a "brutal" attack which left an off-duty police officer with serious injuries.

image.altText: Koby is a young man who wears a suit jacket and sunglasses and walks on a CBD street.

items.title: Life a 'continuous nightmare' for family of woman set alight by her son

children.content: NSW grandmother Nerol Doble was murdered by her son Shannon James Doble in 2024 after an argument over the use of a jerry can. During a sentencing hearing, family members told the court of the hell his actions have left them in.

image.altText: An elderly woman with short grey hair wearing a white and blue striped shirt.

items.title: Second midwife charged over baby's death following failed homebirth

children.content: Jordan Michaela Holland is the second midwife charged with manslaughter over the death of a baby after a failed homebirth in Newcastle.

image.altText: Close up of the abdomen of a heavily pregnant woman

items.title: Family 'empty and shocked' after surfer's death over $50 dispute

children.content: Guy Haymes was left in a vegetative state after an assault during a dispute over $50 in February, 2024.

image.altText: A middle-aged man wearing a cap smiles at the camera.

items.title: From Apollo to Artemis, the lunar legacy of the Parkes 'Dish' continues

children.content: The Parkes Observatory — also known as The Dish — continues a legacy of supporting lunar missions that started more than 50 years ago, helping Artemis II go where humanity has not since 1972.

gallery.altText: The moons surface with earth in the background
John Sarkissian sitting in the control room of Parkes Observatory

thumbnail.altText: The moons surface with earth in the background
John Sarkissian sitting in the control room of Parkes Observatory

items.title: University's overseas operations set to come under the microscope

children.content: The University of Wollongong operates five overseas campuses, but a parliamentary inquiry has noted concerns it may be be neglecting its responsibilities closer to home.

image.altText: Students walking in carpark, campus sign in foreground

items.title: Man pleads guilty to dealing with millions of dollars from illegal tobacco

children.content: Malek Alhmedai's hire car had $4 million stashed inside, with the money linked to illegal tobacco sales.

image.altText: Boxes of cigarettes surrounded by Australian cash.

items.title: Minister says there is no 'proper timetable' for reopening NSW highway

children.content: Geotechnical studies find significant gaps in the structure beneath the Great Western Highway, with delays to its reopening expected.

image.altText: windy road with crack on it and road cones

items.title: Police not ruling out foul play as search continues for missing NSW woman

children.content: The daughter of Yvonne Whear, 73, who went missing in February, says there is no evidence to suggest her mum left her northern NSW home of her own accord.
